title: Brescia, Lombardy — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Brescia, Lombardy: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Brescia is a city in Lombardy with a population of 200,000. A historic Lombard city with well-preserved Roman ruins, a magnificent medieval castle, and a thriving industrial and cultural scene.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
